posts.author: cgardner (Crystal Gardner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

It would be nice to have an activity log or have sub-items included in the overall board activity log. This would help for troubleshooting any issues that come up with sub-items. For example, we use an app called “Subitem Templates”, recently anytime we pull in a sub-item it would disappear, and we had no idea why because no activity is currently recorded for sub-items.

What are you trying to achieve

Record activity for sub-items so we can better troubleshoot any errors that happen.
